metadata.description: A community-driven marketplace for Claude Code plugins. Open to all contributors.

plugins.name: aws-agent-plugins
plugins.description: 7 plugins for AWS services including Amplify, Serverless, DB, Deploy, Migration, and SageMaker

plugins.name: cc-devops-skills
plugins.description: 31 DevOps skills covering Terraform, Helm, kubectl, GitHub Actions with linting, security checks, and dry-run validation

plugins.name: ccpm
plugins.description: Project management for Claude Code using GitHub Issues

plugins.name: ccusage
plugins.description: CLI usage dashboard for tracking Claude Code token consumption

plugins.name: claude-aws-cost-saver
plugins.description: Finds AWS cost savings with 163 checks across 30+ services

plugins.name: claude-code-builder
plugins.description: Guided commands to generate skills, subagents, hooks, slash commands, and plugins with proper scaffolding

plugins.name: claude-code-nvim
plugins.description: Seamless Neovim integration for Claude Code

plugins.name: claude-code-safety-net
plugins.description: Hook that catches destructive git and filesystem commands before execution

plugins.name: claude-code-workflows
plugins.description: Production-ready development workflows with specialized agents for requirements analysis, TDD, QA, and code review

plugins.name: claude-hub
plugins.description: Webhook service connecting Claude Code to GitHub for automated workflows

plugins.name: claude-hud
plugins.description: Real-time statusline showing context window usage, active tools, running agents, git info, and todo progress

plugins.name: claude-night-market
plugins.description: 19 production-ready plugins covering code review, spec-driven development, architecture patterns, and Python specialist tools

plugins.name: claude-scientific-skills
plugins.description: Ready-to-use skills for research, science, and engineering documentation

plugins.name: claude-sdlc
plugins.description: Software development lifecycle automation with SDLC workflow commands and a four-layer skill testing framework

plugins.name: communitytools
plugins.description: AI-powered penetration testing automation with OWASP Top 10 coverage, CVSS 3.1 scoring, and MITRE ATT&CK mappings

plugins.name: compound-engineering
plugins.description: Structured workflow emphasizing 80% planning/review and 20% execution with ideate, brainstorm, plan, work, and review phases

plugins.name: container-use
plugins.description: Isolated development environments for coding agents using containers

plugins.name: documentation-plugin
plugins.description: Documentation generation, technical writing, README creation, and documentation management workflows

plugins.name: edamame-claude-code
plugins.description: Runtime behavioral monitoring plugin that detects divergence between stated intent and actual system behavior

plugins.name: libre-uiux
plugins.description: Complete UI/UX system with 152 agents, 74 skills, and 76 commands for structured design communication using design tokens

plugins.name: recall
plugins.description: Full-text search your Claude Code sessions

plugins.name: statistical-research
plugins.description: 13 commands and 17 skills for academic workflows including literature management, manuscript writing, and arXiv/Crossref/BibTeX integration

plugins.name: superpowers
plugins.description: Agentic skills framework and software development methodology with structured TDD workflow

plugins.name: tdd-guard
plugins.description: Automated TDD enforcement that monitors agent actions and blocks violations in real-time

plugins.name: vercel-agent-skills
plugins.description: Vercel's official collection of agent skills for deployment workflows
